text:
## Team Context **Your assigned name**: spec-developer-preset **Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach me) **Protocol**: QUESTION / BLOCKER / DONE / SUGGESTION via SendMessage **Context Strategy**: repomix (all context pre-loaded below) **Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first. ## Task **Beads ID**: ui-kit-3c2 **Title**: Wire preset UI into rkrhub layout Integrate the existing ExportPreset, ImportPreset, and PresetToCode components into the rkrhub app's actual UI. ## CRITICAL RULES - ALWAYS use `-f` flags for cp/mv/rm operations - Use absolute paths for all file operations - Do NOT push or commit - This is an Nx monorepo at `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit` ## Current State ### Preset components exist but are NOT used anywhere: - `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/features/preset/ExportPreset.tsx` - exports theme as JSON - `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/features/preset/ImportPreset.tsx` - imports theme from JSON - `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/features/preset/PresetToCode.tsx` - generates TypeScript code - `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/features/preset/index.ts` - only exports ExportPreset and ImportPreset (missing PresetToCode!) ### Current app layout (`/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/app/app.tsx`): ```tsx function AppContent() { const { state, dispatch, computedTheme, resolver } = useThemeBuilder(); return (
...
); } ``` ### Store provides (`/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/store/index.ts`): - `useThemeBuilder()` returns `{ state, dispatch, computedTheme, resolver }` - `ThemeBuilderAction` includes `IMPORT_STATE`, `SET_PRESET`, `UPDATE_OVERRIDE`, `UPDATE_COMPONENT` - `ThemeBuilderState` has `overrides`, `components`, `colorScheme`, `activePreset` ### Preset components need these props: - `ExportPreset` needs: `{ state: ThemeBuilderState }` - `ImportPreset` needs: `{ dispatch: Dispatch, onImport?: (preset) => void }` - `PresetToCode` needs: `{ state: ThemeBuilderState }` ## Implementation Plan 1. **Update preset/index.ts** to also export PresetToCode: ```ts export { PresetToCode } from './PresetToCode'; ``` 2. **Create a PresetPanel component** that combines all three preset features with a tabbed interface (Export / Import / Code): - Create `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/rkrhub/src/features/preset/PresetPanel.tsx` - Use simple tabs (not the UI kit Tabs - this is the rkrhub app which uses tailwind classes) - 3 tabs: "Export" (ExportPreset), "Import" (ImportPreset), "Code" (PresetToCode) - Takes `state` and `dispatch` from useThemeBuilder 3. **Wire into app.tsx** - Add the PresetPanel as a new Section in the Theme Builder area, between CodeOutput and the Component Playground section: ```tsx
``` OR, better yet, integrate it INTO the existing Theme Builder section after CodeOutput. 4. **The PresetPanel component** should use the `useThemeBuilder()` hook directly (it's inside the ThemeBuilderProvider) so it doesn't need props passed down. ## Design Guidelines - The rkrhub app uses Tailwind CSS classes for styling (see ExportPreset.tsx/ImportPreset.tsx) - Use motion from framer-motion for tab transitions if desired - Keep the design consistent with the existing rkrhub look and feel - The tabs should be simple and clean - matching the rest of the app ## Deliverables 1. PresetToCode added to preset/index.ts exports 2. New PresetPanel.tsx component with tabbed interface 3. PresetPanel wired into app.tsx layout 4. DONE message with file list and summary
